response.justification: Candidate lacks both mandatory requirements: strong recent C++ development (only 6 months documented in 2014-2015, absent from resume for 11 years) and Windows platform expertise. No capital markets, fixed income, derivatives, or investment banking domain exposure. Career trajectory focused on web, mobile, and data platforms in non-financial sectors, with most recent work in TypeScript/Node.js and AI infrastructure.
strengths: 20+ years of professional software development experience across diverse domains and platforms
Demonstrated communication excellence through workshops, conference talks, and teaching roles
CI/CD infrastructure and DevOps knowledge from Altom Consulting role
concerns: C++ experience minimal and stale (6 months at National Instruments in 2014-2015, none documented since)
No Windows platform expertise evident; career heavily Linux/web-focused with no SQL Server or Oracle exposure
Complete absence of capital markets, fixed income, derivatives, or investment banking domain knowledge
